response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture or distributed systems leadership, and no demonstrable technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Experience with CI/CD, DevOps tooling, and distributed systems at scale
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable cloud compute platform architecture experience
No documented technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
